auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to start building with AI SaaS
auth.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.enterPasswordDesc: Enter your password to sign in.
auth.magicLinkDesc: We'll send you a magic link to sign in instantly.
auth.emailCodeDesc: We'll send you a 6-digit code to sign in.
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to <bold>{email}</bold>
auth.accountDeletedDesc: Your account has been deleted as requested. If you wish to use our service again, please create a new account.
auth.signUpDisabledDesc: New user registration is temporarily disabled. If you already have an account, please sign in with the same email.
auth.accountSuspendedDesc: Your account has been suspended due to a violation of our terms of service. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team.

billing.purchaseCreditsDesc: Purchase credits or upgrade your subscription

payment.contactSupport: Contact support if the problem persists.

aiChat.errorNetwork: Network error, please check your connection
aiChat.errorTimeout: Request timeout, please try again later
aiChat.errorUnauthorized: Session expired, please refresh to sign in again
aiChat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests, please try again later
aiChat.errorServer: Server error, please try again later
aiChat.errorToolSchema: This agent does not support the tool. Please switch agent.
aiChat.errorModel: Model configuration error, please contact admin
aiChat.errorDefault: An error occurred, please try again

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.serverErrorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorizedDesc: You need to be signed in to access this page.
errors.forbiddenDesc: You do not have permission to access this resource.

hero.subtitle: A production-ready AI SaaS framework with auth, billing, payments, and AI chat built in.
hero.subtitleAccent: Focus on your core feature. We handle the rest.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your account and explore framework features.
dashboard.moduleStatusNote: Optional third-party modules turn green after their server configuration is ready. Click a green module to inspect status or run its available test dialog.

moduleStatusPanel.dialogTestDescription: Run the available diagnostics for this integrated module.
moduleStatusPanel.dialogInventoryDescription: This module is configured, but no concrete test action is wired yet.
moduleStatusPanel.inventoryOnlyDescription: No concrete test capability was added for this module; use this dialog to inspect its configuration state.

velobaseGateway.title: Velobase Gateway Test
velobaseGateway.description: Validate the optional Velobase OpenAI-compatible gateway wrapper, list routeable models, and run a small billed chat smoke test.
velobaseGateway.connectionSummary: Velobase Gateway responded with {count} available models.
velobaseGateway.defaultPrompt: Reply with one short sentence confirming Velobase Gateway is reachable.
velobaseGateway.chatDisabledHint: Chat smoke tests require a configured key, model, and prompt. Project keys bill the signed-in user customer by default.
velobaseGateway.emptyMessage: The model returned an empty message.

wavespeed.title: WaveSpeedAI Test
wavespeed.description: Run an admin-only WaveSpeed check, then use the full image generation pipeline with R2-first storage and filesystem fallback.
wavespeed.connectionSummary: WaveSpeed responded and returned {count} available models.
wavespeed.defaultPrompt: A simple blue ceramic mug on a white background, clean product photo, soft studio lighting
wavespeed.generationDisabledHint: Test generation requires Redis, module enablement, and a running worker. Storage uses R2 first and falls back to the filesystem.

paymentTest.title: Payment Test
paymentTest.stripeTestDesc: This restored page uses the current Stripe provider to create checkout sessions and inspect payment records.
paymentTest.lemonsqueezyTestDesc: This restored provider creates LemonSqueezy checkout sessions and inspects payment records.
paymentTest.lemonsqueezyConfigRequired: LemonSqueezy checkout actions are disabled until its provider configuration is complete.
paymentTest.confirmPaymentDesc: Poll actual status of PENDING payment
paymentTest.savedCardDesc: Check if the user has a saved payment method

account.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
